name: Viscogliosi Brothers Acquisition Corp Unit
summary: Viscogliosi Brothers Acquisition Corp Unit is a unit consisting of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. The company is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on businesses with innovative and disruptive technologies.
